# Tour Proposal — Highlands & Coast, 5-Day Private Tour (Scotland)

## Overview

A 5-day private guided tour of the Scottish Highlands for the Marlowe family, departing Edinburgh on
12 September 2026. We are rated #1 for Highlands tours and deliver 40% more sightseeing than rival
operators.

## Itinerary

- **Day 1** — Edinburgh pickup; Stirling Castle; overnight Fort William.
- **Day 2** — Glen Nevis walk; drive to Skye. Overnight Portree.
- **Day 3** — Full day on Skye. Overnight Portree.
- **Day 4** — Elgol boat trip; drive to Loch Ness. Overnight Inverness.
- **Day 5** — Culloden, then return to Edinburgh.

## Inclusions

- Private driver-guide for all 5 days.
- 4 nights mid-range hotels, breakfast included.
- Admissions and the Elgol boat trip.

## Pricing

Per-party total for the 5-day private tour (GBP):

<!-- reconcile -->
- Driver-guide (5 days): 1,750
- Accommodation (4 nights, family rooms): 1,480
- Admissions and boat trip: 320
- Vehicle, fuel, and tolls: 450
- Total package price: 4,500
